value.name: Travel Brown Leather Cigar Case
value.description:
Our cigar case is crafted from high-quality cedar wood and top-notch leather, equipped with a secure zipper lock mechanism. The precise cedar lining retains the taste, while leather products exude elegance. Elevating aging and nourishing cigars into a clever science.

 The size of the cigar case can accommodate cigars up to 7.0 inches in length, and the ring size is 56. Please note that some longer cigars may not be suitable.

 Use the included humidifier dropper to easily achieve optimal humidity. Simply add distilled water or cigar humidifier solution and place it in the cigar box to protect the cigar from drying. The provided dropper enhances convenience.

Material

Specifications and Color Options

• YL: Yellow

• WH: White

• Packaging: Boxed

 

Dimensions and Weight

• Packaging Dimensions: 235 x 100 x 40mm

• Net Weight: 390g

• Gross Weight: 435g

 

This ceramic four-rest ashtray features a vibrant painted finish, available in multiple colors, combining functionality with artistic elegance.
